commands.review_summary:
The PR makes terminal session statuses override stale active-run flags in Control UI run-state rendering/reconciliation and adds focused UI regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main can receive terminal session status and an independently overlaid active-run flag, while the Control UI currently lets the active flag keep abort/in-progress UI alive. I did not run a live browser reproduction in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: No automated fix PR is appropriate because the remaining blocker is contributor real behavior proof, not a narrow repairable code defect.

target.title: [codex] Fix Control UI terminal run status recovery
target.body:
## Summary
- stop treating terminal session rows as active runs when `hasActiveRun` lingers after completion
- let terminal chat run status win over stale abortable UI so the Control UI returns to done instead of staying in progress
- add regressions for abort recovery, terminal session refresh, chat rendering, and session badges

Closes #84041.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/sessions.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/sessions.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json ui/src/ui/session-run-state.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.ts ui/src/ui/chat/run-lifecycle.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.ts ui/src/ui/views/sessions.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/sessions.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/sessions.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.ui.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-ui-issue-84041.tsbuildinfo`
- `git diff --check -- ui/src/ui/session-run-state.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.ts ui/src/ui/chat/run-lifecycle.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.ts ui/src/ui/views/sessions.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/sessions.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/sessions.test.ts`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Control UI no longer stays in an in-progress state after a run has already reached a terminal status but the session row still reports `hasActiveRun: true`.
Real environment tested: local source checkout on macOS with targeted UI Vitest coverage; remote Crabbox/Testbox changed-gate proof was attempted but blocked because the local Crabbox binary is not installed in this environment.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: rendered the chat view with terminal `runStatus`, `stream: null`, and stale `hasActiveRun: true` session rows in `ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`; refreshed sessions with `status: "done"` plus stale `hasActiveRun: true` in `ui/src/ui/controllers/sessions.test.ts`; checked `hasAbortableSessionRun` and session badges against the same stale-terminal shape.
Evidence after fix: the composer now renders `Done`, hides the stale stop/reading UI, re-enables context compaction, and session refresh clears stale local run tracking even when `hasActiveRun` lags behind terminal status.
Observed result after fix: targeted Vitest coverage, oxlint, tsgo, and `git diff --check` all passed.
target.author: nianjiuzst
